aljazeera.title: Morocco says it has dismantled ISIL-linked cell planning attack

monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Resumes Attacks in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Reports

— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 7m ago. Iran has resumed attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, per reporting from Axios, marking renewed hostilities against commercial shipping in the strategic chokepoint.
Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 20h ago. Israeli Defense Minister Katz claims Israel assassinated Ali Khamenei, stating it was in response to his plans to destroy Israel and warning future Iranian leaders.
Iran Strikes Tankers With Missiles and Drone Near Strait of Hormuz
— S3 · Conflict · Bab el-Mandeb · 3h ago. UKMTO warning 080-26 reports a maritime attack near the Bab el-Mandeb strait. Vessels advised to exercise caution.
